## Change Type

- [ ] Add provider (create `site/src/data/providers/<id>.json` and append `<id>` to `_order.json`)
- [ ] Update provider info (status / models / rate limits — edit the matching `site/src/data/providers/<id>.json`)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other
